handling_classes.name: cryogenic_first_benchmark_path
handling_classes.allowed_before_next_checkpoint: no unplanned excursion above the assigned cryogenic stage before the first retained-state measurement and 77 K hold checkpoints

handling_classes.name: controlled_intermediate_warm_path
handling_classes.allowed_before_next_checkpoint: one planned 160-170 K hold after the initial cryogenic retained-state checks

handling_classes.name: controlled_high_warm_path
handling_classes.allowed_before_next_checkpoint: one planned 200 K hold after earlier checkpoints

handling_classes.name: room_temperature_stress_path
handling_classes.allowed_before_next_checkpoint: one planned 293 K excursion only after all earlier evidence is captured
